content: MongoDB operator injection: (1)  operator executes JS on server — never pass user input to . (2) User-supplied filter objects can contain {'$gt': ''} or {'$regex': '.*'} operators; ODMs must validate input is a plain expected-type value, not operator objects. (3) mongo-sanitize strips keys starting with $ before passing to driver. (4) Type-cast all user inputs to expected types (string, number) before using in queries. (5) Setting javascriptEnabled:false in mongod.conf disables  class entirely. (6) JSON Schema server-side validation does NOT protect against operator injection in query filters — only insert/update payloads are validated.
